name: Ann Moncure Wall Park
description: Two permanent pickleball courts have replaced one of the previous tennis courts.  This site now features one tennis court and two pickleball courts.

name: Ashland Conservancy
description: Ashland Conservancy is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manassas, VA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Brittany Neighborhood Park
description: Come play pickleball at Brittany Neighborhood Park in Dumfries, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Clareybrook Park
description: Neighborhood park with a single pickleball court using sport court style tiles

name: Dean park
description: Dean park is a place to play pickleball in Manassas, VA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Dill Dinkers Manassas VA
description: Dill Dinkers Manassas VA is a place to play pickleball in Manassas, VA. There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, adaptive programming, wheelchair accessibility, youth programming, and water.

name: Dominion Valley Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Dominion Valley Country Club in Haymarket, VA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Ferlazzo Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ferlazzo Courts in Woodbridge, VA! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Four Seasons at Historic Virginia Community
description: Four Seasons at Historic Virginia Community is a place to play pickleball in Dumfries, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Freedom Aquatic and Fitness Center
description: Game times as of 8/23 are Tuesdays and Thursdays at 6 AM till as late as 9. Other days and times can be arranged at the front desk. Daily admission is $5 for pickleball or you can purchase an 8 punch pass that gets the daily admission down to $4
fees: Fee required — Membership, Or a daily entrance fee for PB is $5. An 8 punch Pickleball pass is available for $32

name: Hellwig
description: Come play pickleball at Hellwig in Manassas, VA! There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: James S Long Park
description: James S Long Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Haymarket, VA. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: KSports Complex - Pickleball Court
description: Come play pickleball at KSports Complex - Pickleball Court in Manassas, VA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Lake Ridge - Antietam
description: Lake Ridge - Antietam is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodbridge, VA. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Lake Ridge H.O.A. - Oakwood Dr
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Ridge H.O.A. - Oakwood Dr in Woodbridge, VA! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The court is private.

name: Metz Middle School
description: Metz Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manassas, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. A tennis net is available, but you’ll need to create your own lines. The courts are free.

name: Montclair Country Club

name: Montclair Tennis Club
description: Come play pickleball at Montclair Tennis Club in Dumfries, VA! There are 4 courts. 2 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.

name: Osborn High School
description: Osborn High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manassas, VA. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: PWC Pickleball Courts
description: PWC Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodbridge, VA. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play.

name: Regency at Dominion Valley
description: Come play pickleball at Regency at Dominion Valley in Haymarket, VA! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Stonewall Park
description: 3 courts with nets, 2 practice courts (bring your own nets)

name: Veterans Memorial Regional Park

description: Westminster At Lake Ridge is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lake Ridge, VA. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.
